project.title: USP8 maintains ESC stemness via deubiquitination of EPG5
project.projectDescription: The coiled-coil domain of EPG5 was synthesized as follows: Biotin-MNKNEAVSQQIHVLQKEVRQLQAE AAQ (from Beijing SciLight Biotechnology, LCC). 1 mg of this short peptide was incubated with ES cells lysates followed by immunoprecipitation with anti-biotin beads. The precipitates were extensively washed with lysis buffer then boiled with SDS loading buffer and subjected to SDS–PAGE. Total proteins were excised from the gels, then subjected to in-gel digestion and analysis by LC-MS/MS.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The coiled-coil domain of EPG5 was synthesized as follows: Biotin-MNKNEAVSQQIHVLQKEVRQLQAE AAQ (from Beijing SciLight Biotechnology, LCC). 1 mg of this short peptide was incubated with ES cells lysates followed by immunoprecipitation with anti-biotin beads. The precipitates were extensively washed with lysis buffer then boiled with SDS loading buffer and subjected to SDS–PAGE. Total proteins were excised from the gels, then subjected to in-gel digestion and analysis by LC-MS/MS.
